prose.title: 88n mos
prose.body: The 88N MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is a Transportation Management Coordinator in the United States Army. The primary function of an 88N is to coordinate and supervise the movement of personnel, equipment, and supplies for military operations. This includes planning transportation routes, determining the best modes of transportation, and tracking shipments to ensure timely delivery. Additionally, 88Ns may also assist with customs, border clearance procedures, and managing transportation-related systems.
